nav.title: Rotten Chamber
hero.tagline: A single-player social deduction puzzle game
hero.subtitle: Analyze statements · Cross-reference clues · Arrest the corrupt
screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.subtitle: See the chamber in action
howto.title: How to Play
howto.subtitle: Uncover the corruption in four steps
howto.step1.title: Read
howto.step1.desc: Each official makes a statement. Some tell the truth. Some don't. Read carefully.
howto.step2.title: Deduce
howto.step2.desc: Cross-reference statements against each other. If two claims contradict, someone is lying.
howto.step3.title: Investigate
howto.step3.desc: Use abilities and hired professionals to test your theory. Mark suspects with stamps and ribbons.
howto.step4.title: Arrest
howto.step4.desc: Find every corrupt official. Three wrong arrests and you lose. Arrest the Mayor by mistake and it's over instantly.
roles.title: The Chamber
roles.subtitle: 15 unique roles. Each with a statement, an agenda and something to hide.
roles.more: ...and 6 more innocent roles to discover in-game.
roles.corrupt_mystery_desc: Corrupt officials disguise themselves as innocent roles. Some blackmail, some silence, some convert loyalties. Every lie is a clue if you know where to look.
role.mayor.name: Mayor
role.mayor.web_desc: The only face you can trust. Sits at the head of the table and vouches for one official. But is that trust deserved?
role.legal_advocate.name: Legal Advocate
role.legal_advocate.web_desc: Points at someone and asks: are you lying? One question. One answer. Use it wisely.
role.council_chair.name: Council Chair
role.council_chair.web_desc: Knows whether the corrupt are sitting together or scattered. A single yes-or-no that changes everything.
role.police_chief.name: Police Chief
role.police_chief.web_desc: Feels the tension next door. Tells you if corruption is sitting right beside them.
role.crook.name: Crook
role.silencer.name: Silencer
role.blackmailer.name: Blackmailer
role.converter.name: Converter
role.manipulator.name: Manipulator
features.title: Features
features.subtitle: What makes Rotten Chamber unique
feature.deduction.title: Pure Deduction
feature.deduction.desc: No dice rolls. No card draws. Every puzzle is solvable through logic alone. If you got it wrong, you missed something.
feature.campaign.title: Campaign Mode
feature.campaign.desc: 45 levels across three acts. New roles and corrupt abilities unlock as you advance. Lose a level and your entire run is over.
feature.custom.title: Custom Games
feature.custom.desc: Choose the chamber size, the number of corrupt officials, the difficulty and which roles appear. Build exactly the puzzle you want.
feature.professionals.title: Hired Professionals
feature.professionals.desc: Earn rare specialists between levels. Deploy them as one-shot abilities: interrogate a suspect, reveal an alignment or reset a used power.
feature.annotation.title: Annotation Tools
feature.annotation.desc: Mark cards with stamps (innocent, corrupt, suspicious) and color ribbons to track your deductions as clues build up.
feature.tutorial.title: Interactive Tutorial
feature.tutorial.desc: A guided tutorial walks you through reading statements, using abilities and making your first arrest. Learn by doing, not by reading.
